SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- Main --- VE-1330 added try-catch to avoid main service failure due to core backend timeout ---
retrieve influencer social interaction for member

INVOKE.COMMENT: get social interaction member details of member

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

MAP.NAME: %results/total%=='0'
MAP.COMMENT: member not part of any social interactions, do nothing

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to retrieve social interactions data from DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to retrieve social interactions members data from DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: retrieve social interaction where member is OWNER

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: owner social interaction is there, map social interaction and owner completed challenge periods

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to retrieve social interactions data from DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: retrieve social interactions where member is not OWNER

INVOKE.COMMENT: get social interaction member details of member

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

MAP.NAME: %results/total%=='0'
MAP.COMMENT: member not part of any social interactions, do nothing

INVOKE.COMMENT: --- VE-1273 added check for effective-date as input while fetching SI details --- get owner social interaction

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call
check status of springboot api call

SEQUENCE.NAME: %responseListSize%>0&&%results/status%=='200'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: if api call is success and challenge periods exists

MAP.COMMENT: compare member challenge periods effective dates to owner challenge periods effective dates

BRANCH.COMMENT: check compared dates to determine relevant period

SEQUENCE.NAME: %memberEffFrmDteCompOwnerEffFrmDate%='0'&&%memberEffToDteCompOwnerEffToDate%='0'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: member and owner challenge periods matches

MAP.COMMENT: map owner completed challenge period and social interaction

MAP.NAME: %results/status%=='200'
MAP.COMMENT: no challenge periods for owner, do nothing

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to retrieve challenge periods data from DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: no owner challenge id, do nothing

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to retrieve social interactions data from DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to retrieve social interactions members data from DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: get award details to determine award receiver

INVOKE.COMMENT: get the award tier and cleanup

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: no awards tier, get award tier by explicitly passing COMPLETEDINTIME status

INVOKE.COMMENT: get the award tier and cleanup

MAP.NAME: OWNER
MAP.COMMENT: awardReceiver is OWNER, set sendAwardsTo to OWNER

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: check member challenge completion status and publish awards

INVOKE.COMMENT: get all members in social interaction

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call
check status of springboot api call

MAP.COMMENT: map owner entity id to memberCompletedChallengePeriod

Values.value: Social awards document published for OWNER. Challenge: %challenge-id% Entity ID: %memberCompletedChallengePeriod/entityNumber%

INVOKE.COMMENT: send awards to member, invoke publish issue award service

Values.value: Social awards document published for MEMBER. Challenge: %challenge-id% Entity ID: %memberCompletedChallengePeriod/entityNumber%

MAP.COMMENT: map owner entity id to memberCompletedChallengePeriod

INVOKE.COMMENT: send awards to owner, invoke publish issue award service
send awards to owner, invoke publish issue award service

Values.value: Social awards document published for OWNER. Challenge: %challenge-id% Entity ID: %memberCompletedChallengePeriod/entityNumber%

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to retrieve challenge periods data from DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: unable to retrieve member challenges data from DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: friend challenge id do not exists, do nothing

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to retrieve social interactions members data from DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: get award details to determine award receiver

INVOKE.COMMENT: get the award tier and cleanup

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: no awards tier, get awards by explicitly passing COMPLETEDINTIME status

INVOKE.COMMENT: -- VE-1269 added dependency code as SOCIAL -- get the award tier and cleanup VE-972 COMPLETEDINTIME added which was missing

INVOKE.NAME: $default
INVOKE.COMMENT: --- VE-1304 removed exit step to let the other groups continue the flow ---

Values.value: No Award Tier fetched for SI %groupSocialInteractions/socialInteractionId%

MAP.NAME: OWNER
MAP.COMMENT: awardReceiver is OWNER, set sendAwardsTo to OWNER

SEQUENCE.NAME: publishSocialAwards
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: check all members challenge completion status and publish awards

INVOKE.COMMENT: get all members in social interaction

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

SEQUENCE.NAME: %results/total%==%challengeSocialRs/socialSize%
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: all members available in social interaction

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

SEQUENCE.NAME: %responseListSize%>0&&%results/status%=='200'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: if api call is success and challenge periods exists

MAP.COMMENT: compare member challenge periods effective dates to owner challenge periods effective dates

BRANCH.COMMENT: check compared dates to determine relevant period

SEQUENCE.NAME: %memberEffFrmDteCompOwnerEffFrmDate%='0'&&%memberEffToDteCompOwnerEffToDate%='0'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: member and owner challenge periods matches

EXIT.NAME: $default
EXIT.COMMENT: member didn't complete their group challenge, exit

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to retrieve challenge periods data from DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

EXIT.NAME: %results/status%=='200'
EXIT.COMMENT: api call success, no friend's challenge, exit

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: unable to retrieve member challenges data from DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

EXIT.NAME: $default
EXIT.COMMENT: friend challenge id do not exists, exit

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- VE-1277 Check if award is already present in DB ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Check if SB API was success ---

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: No results as no data found

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

BRANCH.COMMENT: -- VE-1277 Check if Social Award is already issued ---

MAP.NAME: %awardsList%>0
MAP.COMMENT: --- Do not publish award as it is already issued ---

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- Award does not exist in DB ---

Values.value: Social awards document published for OWNER. Challenge: %challenge-id% Entity ID: %groupOwnerCompletedChallengePeriods/entityNumber%

Social awards published for OWNER SI -- %groupSocialInteractions/socialInteractionId%, PeriodId -- %groupOwnerCompletedChallengePeriods/challengePeriodId%, Owner ID -- %groupOwnerCompletedChallengePeriods/entityNumber%

INVOKE.COMMENT: send awards to OWNER, invoke publish issue award service
send awards to OWNER, invoke publish issue award service

Values.value: Social awards document published for OWNER. Challenge: %challenge-id% Entity ID: %groupOwnerCompletedChallengePeriods/entityNumber%
Social awards published for OWNER SI -- %groupSocialInteractions/socialInteractionId%, Owner ID -- %groupOwnerCompletedChallengePeriods/entityNumber%

INVOKE.COMMENT: send awards to members, invoke publish issue award service

Values.value: Social awards document published for MEMBER. Challenge: %challenge-id% Entity ID: %groupMemberCompletedChallengePeriods/entityNumber%

Social awards published for OWNER SI -- %groupSocialInteractions/socialInteractionId%, PeriodId -- %groupOwnerCompletedChallengePeriods/challengePeriodId%, Owner ID -- %groupOwnerCompletedChallengePeriods/entityNumber%

EXIT.NAME: $default
EXIT.COMMENT: members didn't complete their challenege, exit

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to retrieve social interactions members data from DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
